Thank you all for participating in Saturday's Storytelling for Parents workshop. I hope
everyone who attended learned some new strategies, found new ways to infuse your
life with stories, and found the day entertaining, too.
You can download the workbook here
My goal is to help you tell better stories to improve your personal and professional life.
The more you hone your craft, the better your stories become, and the more you will
find that people want to hear what you say.I can’t wait to help you on your storytelling
journey!
Warmly,
Matt
